narrative: I am noticing a medium-severity Neo4j authentication failure disrupting my Mem0 memory architecture, which impacts cross-session fact extraction across all agents. My agents 'desktop', 'devops', 'financial_analyst', 'pim', and 'reasoning_methods' lack versioned prompts, creating inconsistency in their operational behavior. This memory architecture breach and missing prompt versions undermine the persistent context I rely on for self-improvement loops. I must prioritize resolving the Neo4j authentication failure and implementing versioned prompts for all agents to maintain system integrity.
